name: SuperEats
short_description: An action game where you use super powers to fly freely and deliver food at ultra-high speed! In 'SuperEats,' race across Gourmet Island. Hurry, a little destruction is acceptable to get the goods there! Uncover the mystery of the amnesiac hero and become a legendary delivery person!
detailed_description:
A super high-speed delivery action game, SuperEats !

◆The stage is Gourmet Island, where appetites swirl...!

On this vibrant island, where top chefs and hungry gourmands from around the world gather, you'll work as a super-fast delivery person, "SuperEats".

◆Exhilarating Action of Speed and Destruction!

Race through the city and complete a flood of delivery requests at top speed!

Pick up the food from the restaurant and deliver it to the customer as fast as you can!

Hurry! A little (?) destruction is inevitable to deliver fresh, hot food!

◆Uncover the Mystery of the Hero with No Memory!

Why do you have this supernatural speed? Why are you working as a delivery person?

The protagonist, who had lost all past memories upon waking up, will uncover their own roots and the hidden truth of Gourmet Island through encounters with the city's inhabitants.

◆Get Rewards and Unlock a New You!

Complete requests to earn big tips and unlock a variety of "Hero Suits"!

Find your own flight style and become the coolest delivery person around!

Can you become a legend of Gourmet Island!?

*There are no character growth elements (like skill trees or speed-ups). You are the fastest hero from the very beginning!

The main story is expected to take about 2 hours to complete.
